title: Supply side issues resurface in energy and metal markets
section_path: Supply side issues resurface in energy and metal markets
section_path_text: Supply side issues resurface in energy and metal markets
summary:
Main
Energy and metal markets struggled for direction amid conflicting supply side issues. A resilient US labour market weighed on sentiment in the gold market. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-07-25 133426.png | assets/2025-07-25_supply-side-issues-resurface-in-energy-and-metal-markets_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_c0f59822c2f9.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil extended gains as US-EU trade talks progressed.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Energy and metal markets struggled for direction amid conflicting supply side issues. A resilient US labour market weighed on sentiment in the gold market.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil extended gains as US-EU trade talks progressed. Reports that both parties are working towards a deal that would set a 15% tariff for most goods, similar to the US's agreement with Japan, has boosted confidence that a worst-case scenario of a 30% tariff is avoidable.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Copper production in Chile has staged a recovery in recent months. Output returned to growth in 2024 as miners overcame operational issues.
